title: T's Custom Textures
description: The custom texture pack for the We  Are The Boredom Minecraft server.
body:
## T's Custom Textures
The custom texture packs are made for compatibility with my [Custom Craft Datapacks](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ts-crafts/) and the We Are The Boredom Minecraft server.
### List of all named custom textures (1.21.5+)
| Minecraft Item      | Name               |
|---------------------|--------------------|
| Totem Of Undying    | TBackes08          |
| Totem Of Undying    | DeathWolffe        |
| Paper               | Creeper            |
| Paper               | TBackes08          |
| Netherite Sword     | Red Netherite Sword|
| Netherite Helmet    | TBackes08          |


*All gallary images use [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound), [rotorBLOCKS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rotrblocks), and [T's Custom Textures](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ts-textures).*
